title: Smoky Floral Canadian Puff Pastry Tart
description: A flaky puff pastry tart infused with smoky paprika, delicate floral notes, and a touch of Sichuan pepper—sweetened naturally for a kid‑friendly Canadian treat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Lay the puff pastry sheet on the parchment and trim a 1 cm border.
In a bowl, mix the cream cheese, smoked Gouda, smoked paprika, crushed Sichuan peppercorns, dried lavender buds, rose petals, stevia syrup, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Spread the mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving the border uncovered.
Brush the pastry edges with the beaten egg.
Bake for 15‑18 minutes, or until the pastry is golden and the filling is set.
Remove from oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then slice into 6 servings. Garnish with additional edible flowers if desired. Enjoy warm or at room temperature.
